tool_of_day.title: Hugging Face Spaces
tool_of_day.summary: Hugging Face Spaces is a platform for building, deploying, and sharing AI models. It allows users to create and share custom models, and provides a range of tools and resources for building and deploying AI applications.

hot_take: The AI industry is shifting towards more affordable and accessible models, with companies like Google and Anthropic releasing cheaper AI subscription tiers and models, and startups like Lovable and Sandstone raising millions in funding to bring AI to new industries and applications.
